package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspace() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_trimright_space_trimspace"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bytes.TrimRight(..., whitespace)` instead of `bytes.TrimSpace(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
